name: Leverage Shares -1x Short HSBC ETP
summary: Leverage Shares -1x Short HSBC ETP is an exchange-traded product (ETP) designed to provide investors with a leveraged inverse exposure to the daily performance of HSBC shares. This ETP aims to deliver the opposite of the daily percentage change in the price of HSBC shares, multiplied by a leverage factor of -1. It is structured as a debt instrument and is listed on the London Stock Exchange.
